refinement_sections.content: I need to understand what indexing is and why it's important for databases. Indexing helps speed up the retrieval of data, but I need to learn how to choose which fields to index.
The problem mentions efficient query performance for retrieving customer details and order status. I should identify what specific queries are common and how they are structured.
I need to consider how large the database might get and how many transactions will happen. This will help me think about how many indexes might be needed.
I should look into how indexing can take up space and how I can minimize this while still keeping performance high.
I need to outline a basic plan for creating indexes. This might include which fields to index, like customer ID and order status.
I should mention how to keep the indexes updated when new data is added or existing data is changed, although I'm not sure how this works yet.
